rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.606, which governs preferences for teacher certification program participants. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 21.606. PREFERENCES. (a) In selecting persons to participate in the program who are planning to become certified in this state as teachers, the agency shall give preference to a person who:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns teacher certification program preferences, not property tax exemptions.
